summary: A superb audience recording that eclipses many soundboard tapes, capturing one of the best shows of the 1990 spring tour.
review: The reviewer raves about this audience source, saying it leaves typical soundboard recordings in the dust and delivers crystal‑clear detail. They also label the concert as one of the top performances from Spring ’90, noting its bittersweet context with Brent Mydland’s upcoming departure. No specific songs are called out, but the overall impression is overwhelmingly positive.

ai_rating.rationale: Single glowing review praises both the musical performance and the audience recording quality; limited data prevents high confidence.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Audience tape praised for exceptional clarity and presence, described as surpassing many soundboard (SBD) recordings.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Described as one of the best shows of the 1990 spring tour, though no specific songs or set‑by‑set commentary are provided.

band_member_comments.Keys: Mentions Brent Mydland’s impending departure but offers no direct comment on his playing.
